name: 𝚻𝚰𝚳𝚴𝚫𝐒𝚫-𝚻𝚳𝐃
description: Best WhatsApp bot💥 developed by TIMNASA MULTIPLE DEVICE BOT

SESSION_ID.description: Enter the Session ID you received after scanning the QR code

PUBLIC_MODE.description: Set 'yes' for public access or 'no' for private use

AUTO_REACT_STATUS.description: Automatically react to contact statuses with emojis (yes/no)

AUTO_DOWNLOAD_STATUS.description: Download statuses and send them to your DM automatically (yes/no)

AUTO_STATUS_TEXT.description: The message the bot sends after viewing a status

AUTO_READ_MESSAGES.description: Automatically mark messages as read with blue ticks (yes/no)

AUTO_BIO.description: Automatically update your Bio status every minute (yes/no)

AUTO_REACTION.description: Enable automatic emoji reactions to inbox messages (yes/no)

PM_PERMIT.description: Restrict unauthorized users from using the bot in DMs (yes/no)

ANTI_CALL.description: Automatically decline all incoming WhatsApp calls (on/off)

ANTI_BAD.description: Detect and delete messages containing profanity (yes/no)

AUTO_BLOCK.description: Automatically block users who spam your DM (true/false)

STARTING_BOT_MESSAGE.description: Send a notification message when the bot starts (yes/no)

WELCOME_MSG.description: Send a welcome message to new group members (yes/no)

GOODBYE_MSG.description: Send a goodbye message to members leaving the group (yes/no)

ANTI_LINK.description: Remove members who send group invite links (yes/no)

ANTI_SPAM.description: Prevent spamming in groups by restricting rapid messages (yes/no)

READ_COMMANDS.description: Allow the bot to read its own commands (yes/no)

GROUP_ONLY.description: Force the bot to only work in groups (yes/no)

PM_ONLY.description: Force the bot to only work in private messages (yes/no)

AUTO_STICKER.description: Automatically convert all incoming images to stickers (yes/no)

DATABASE_URL.description: Enter your Database URL (MongoDB or PostgreSQL)

AUTO_RESTART.description: Automatically restart the bot if it crashes (yes/no)

WARN_COUNT.description: Number of warnings before a member is kicked from a group

LOG_MESSAGES.description: Keep a log of all incoming/outgoing messages in console (yes/no)
